Wed, Feb 21, 2018 at 06:47pm

Life is a TRAP

I don’t like to talk much about politics (although this shouldn’t be political): I just don’t understand how so many people can be pro-life then once that person is born, they are on their own. In many states, abortions have a 3 day waiting period (WTF?) where you can get a gun and kill 17 kids whenever you want. Where is the protection for them? Most laws for waiting periods on guns are applied to handguns, not shotguns or rifles. Where are the TRAP laws for all guns?

[www.youtube.com/watch](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DRauXXz6t0Y)

Mon, Feb 19, 2018 at 12:46pm

Days like these the phrase “Life is a rough sport” really rings true. 

Tue, Feb 13, 2018 at 02:47pm

After living in the Northwest for many years, you would think I was used to the grey and rainy days. Nope… hate them.

Sat, Feb 10, 2018 at 04:50pm

I will no longer refer to it as ‘My Calendar’ and now refer to it as ‘My Tetris Board’.

Tue, Jan 30, 2018 at 04:14pm

21st Century Schizoid Man

Sitting here watching the College Football Playoffs, I hear 21rst Century Schizoid Man being played by one of the bands. I said “Wow! I am surprised to here that song, it is 48 years old.”. My oldest daughter said “What? That song is only a few years old.”. After a little more schooling on both sides, I realized it is a song by Kayne West called Power. I played the original for the kids: there was much eye rolling.

Mon, Jan 01, 2018 at 05:51pm

Sending out my Apple Watch for repair. Mic not working. Going to miss my activity streak and badges :(.

What I learned on this trip: sleeping on an air mattress is air at night, quicksand in the morning.

Sitting here in Galveston, TX thinking about all my people in the snow in Seattle. Cold and grey yet a great Christmas.
